parameters.apprise_url_plus: threema://${ customer_secrets.{{ params.gateway_id_secret }} }@${ customer_secrets.{{ params.secret_secret }} }/${ customer_secrets.{{ params.targets_secret }} }
parameters.description: Send notifications to your own Threema destination through the UnitySVC gateway. POST the unified message envelope {title, body, type, format}; the gateway composes an Apprise threema:// URL from your stored secrets and delivers via apprise.unitysvc.dev. The free apprise channel uses your own stored credentials; the apprise-plus channel binds extra per-enrollment destinations via parameters.

gateway_id_secret.description: Name of the customer secret holding this enrollment's Threema gateway id

secret_secret.description: Name of the customer secret holding this enrollment's Threema secret

targets_secret.description: Name of the customer secret holding this enrollment's Threema targets
